name: Savoury Aubergine (Eggplant) on Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the aubergine (eggplant) with the cut side down on a baking dish and bake at 400°F (200°C / Gas Mark 6) for about half an hour until soft. Cool.
2. Slice the onion thinly.
3. Fry the sliced onion in olive oil in a frying pan until lightly browned.
4. Scrape the aubergine flesh from the skin and discard the skin.
5. Chop the flesh coarsely and add it to the frying pan, cooking for a couple of minutes longer.
6. Season to taste and serve immediately over hot toast.
